name: Acacia Mining plc
description: Acacia Mining plc, formerly African Barrick Gold plc, was a leading gold mining company operating in Tanzania, with exploration properties in Kenya, Burkina Faso, and Mali. The company produced gold, silver, and copper from its three core mines: Bulyanhulu, Buzwagi, and North Mara. In 2019, Barrick Gold Corporation, which already held a majority stake, acquired the remaining shares of Acacia Mining and fully integrated its operations back into Barrick.
